languages.text: Даже на первый взгляд заметно множество различий между гигантским экспонатом и настоящим дворцом на Даргонусе.

traits.locale_text: Даже на первый взгляд заметно множество различий между гигантским экспонатом и настоящим дворцом на Даргонусе.

languages.text: Even at first glance, you notice many differences between this giant exhibit and the real palace on Dargonus.
languages.original_text: Даже на первый взгляд заметно множество различий между гигантским экспонатом и настоящим дворцом на Даргонусе.

traits.locale_text: Even at first glance, you notice many differences between this giant exhibit and the real palace on Dargonus.
Even at first glance, you notice many differences between this giant exhibit and the real palace on Dargonus.
Even at first glance, you notice many differences between this giant exhibit and the real palace on Dargonus.

languages.text: Selbst auf den ersten Blick erkennst du zahlreiche Unterschiede zwischen diesem gigantischen Exponat und dem realen Palast auf Dargonus.
languages.original_text: Even at first glance, you notice many differences between this giant exhibit and the real palace on Dargonus.

traits.locale_text: Selbst auf den ersten Blick erkennst du zahlreiche Unterschiede zwischen diesem gigantischen Exponat und dem realen Palast auf Dargonus.

languages.text: 哪怕只是乍一看，你也能看出这个巨大的展品和达戈努斯真正的宫殿之间存在着诸多不同之处。
languages.original_text: Even at first glance, you notice many differences between this giant exhibit and the real palace on Dargonus.

traits.locale_text: 哪怕只是乍一看，你也能看出这个巨大的展品和达戈努斯真正的宫殿之间存在着诸多不同之处。

languages.text: Même au premier coup d'œil, vous remarquez de nombreuses différences entre cet endroit et le véritable palais de Dargonus.
languages.original_text: Even at first glance, you notice many differences between this giant exhibit and the real palace on Dargonus.

traits.locale_text: Même au premier coup d'œil, vous remarquez de nombreuses différences entre cet endroit et le véritable palais de Dargonus.

languages.text: Incluso a primera vista ya se advierten numerosas diferencias entre esta exposición gigante y el verdadero palacio de Dargonus.
languages.original_text: Even at first glance, you notice many differences between this giant exhibit and the real palace on Dargonus.

traits.locale_text: Incluso a primera vista ya se advierten numerosas diferencias entre esta exposición gigante y el verdadero palacio de Dargonus.

languages.text: İlk bakışta bile bu devasa sergi ile Dargonus'taki gerçek saray arasındaki pek çok farkı görebiliyorsun.
languages.original_text: Even at first glance, you notice many differences between this giant exhibit and the real palace on Dargonus.

traits.locale_text: İlk bakışta bile bu devasa sergi ile Dargonus'taki gerçek saray arasındaki pek çok farkı görebiliyorsun.

languages.text: この巨大な展示と、ドラゴンスの本物の宮殿には、一見して多くの違いがわかる。
languages.original_text: Even at first glance, you notice many differences between this giant exhibit and the real palace on Dargonus.

traits.locale_text: この巨大な展示と、ドラゴンスの本物の宮殿には、一見して多くの違いがわかる。
